app.name: Hulunote
app.one_liner: An open-source outliner note-taking application with bidirectional linking and AI-powered knowledge organization via Model Context Protocol (MCP) integration.

screens.name: Main Note Editor
screens.purpose: Edit and navigate hierarchical outline notes with bidirectional links and AI-assisted operations.
primary_actions: Trigger AI note generation or restructuring via MCP

rust_commands.name: save_item
rust_commands.purpose: Persist a note or outline node to the local database.

mvp_plan: week 1: Add support for [[wiki-style links]] and backlink indexing
week 1: Implement basic outliner editor with infinite nesting
week 1: Integrate minimal MCP client for AI note generation
acceptance_tests: AI agent connected via MCP can perform batch reorganization of notes based on natural language command.
User can create a nested outline note and save it persistently.
User can insert a [[wiki-style link]] and see it appear in the backlinks panel of the target note.
